settings.quote: Three depths of hydration. One bottle of glow.

settings.title: What it does.
settings.tagline: A 1.5%-hyaluronic top-up your skin will write home about.

settings.heading: Plumps
settings.body: In 7 days. Independently tested on 32 humans.

settings.heading: Hydrates
settings.body: Multi-weight HA holds 1000× its weight in water.

settings.quote: Three molecular weights of hyaluronic acid, working at three depths.
settings.body: Surface plumping you can see. Mid-skin hydration that lasts 12 hours. Deep-layer support that builds over time. One serum, three jobs, no stickiness.

settings.name: Multi-weight Hyaluronic
settings.story: The headline act. Surface plump + mid-skin lock-in + deep-layer support, all in one.

settings.name: Niacinamide 4%
settings.story: Brightens, evens tone, reinforces the skin barrier. The quiet hero.

settings.name: Centella Asiatica
settings.story: Calms redness and post-acne marks. The reason sensitive skins love this serum.

settings.heading: Cleanse
settings.body: Pat skin damp — don't towel dry. The serum locks better onto wet skin.

settings.heading: 3–5 drops
settings.body: Press into face & neck. Don't rub — the HA needs a moment to drink in.

settings.heading: Lock & layer
settings.body: Seal with moisturiser. Use AM and PM, before SPF in the morning.

settings.headline: Bring this bottle back.
settings.body: Top up your serum at our Orchard flagship. Less waste, same hydration. Save 20% per refill.
settings.secondary_text: Or shop the matching refill SKU →

settings.a: Aqua, Sodium Hyaluronate (4 molecular weights), Glycerin, Niacinamide, Pentylene Glycol, Panthenol, Centella Asiatica Extract, Allantoin, Sodium PCA, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Citric Acid.
Free from fragrance, alcohol, essential oils, parabens, sulphates and silicones. Pregnancy and breastfeeding safe.

settings.q: Can I layer it with retinol?
settings.a: Yes — apply this serum first on damp skin, let it sink in, then apply your retinol on top.

settings.q: How long will one bottle last?
settings.a: Most customers finish a 30ml bottle in 2 months at AM + PM use.
